title: Bangku Tua di Sudut Ayunan
theme: Sebuah refleksi melankolis tentang ingatan masa lalu dan bagaimana keluarga berubah seiring waktu, menemukan kedamaian dalam kenangan manis yang bertahan.

cover.prompt: Golden hour in a lively city park. A solitary, weathered wooden park bench with peeling paint is positioned in a quiet area under a flamboyant tree, its branches gently losing leaves. The scene focuses on the quiet contemplation evoked by the bench and tree. In the mid-ground, out of focus, gentle blurs of children playing and bright park equipment catch the warm light, creating a vivid contrast. A subtle silhouette of a person is seated on the bench, adding to the atmosphere of gentle reflection amidst activity. Rule of thirds composition, rich, warm light effects.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Seorang kakek duduk di bangku taman yang sepi, merefleksikan kenangan manis bersama cucu-cucunya yang kini berjauhan. Melihat momen kehangatan keluarga lain memicu kesedihan sekaligus rasa syukur, mendorongnya untuk menemukan kedamaian dan kembali menjalin komunikasi dengan anaknya.
meta.target_emotion: melankolis lembut, rindu, harapan, kedamaian, refleksi
